title: agent-2fa — Policy
description: Schema for the action-classification Policy DSL, per agent-2fa protocol v0.1 §5 and §11. A Policy maps Actions to Risk Levels via ordered match rules, with an optional bypass section for signed, time-bounded windows.

rules.description: Ordered list of match rules. First match wins; unmatched actions fall through to 'default'.

default.description: Risk Level applied to actions that match no rule. MUST be specified.

bypass.description: Optional list of signed, time-boxed bypass entries that shortcut Challenge issuance for matching actions. Each entry MUST be signed by an Authorizer.

command.description: Regex matched against the Action's textual command. Anchors are at the policy author's discretion.

tool.description: Exact-match tool identifier for structured tool calls.

args.description: Optional args subset to match against the tool call. Substring or recursive equality.

risk_during_bypass.description: Risk Level applied while the bypass is active. MUST NOT be 'dual_confirm' (bypass into dual_confirm is meaningless).

bypass_until.description: End of the bypass window. After this time, normal rules apply.

authorized_by.description: The Authorizer who signed this bypass entry.

bypass_signature.description: ed25519 signature by the authorized_by Authorizer over canonical {match, risk_during_bypass, bypass_until, authorized_by}.
